page: Microsoft Azure NC36ds_xl_RTXPRO6000BSE_v6 is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine belonging to the NCdsRTXPRO6000BSEv6XL family. It features 36 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 architecture and an Intel processor, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 132.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 3.67 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration includes a single GPU and comes bundled with 1980 GB of local storage. It is also Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external disk attachments, though it does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The hardware profile is designed to balance compute resources, local storage capacity, and dedicated graphics acceleration, offering a cost-effective solution for workloads requiring local disk space and GPU processing without the overhead of multi-GPU setups.

Given the hardware specifications, this server is suited for workloads such as GPU-accelerated compute tasks, rendering, machine learning inference, and database applications that benefit from local storage and dedicated CPU allocation.
description: Microsoft Azure NC36ds_xl_RTXPRO6000BSE_v6 is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine from the NCdsRTXPRO6000BSEv6XL family, powered by an Intel processor with 36 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance is equipped with 132.0 GB of system memory, yielding 3.67 GB per core. It features a single onboard GPU and 1980 GB of local storage, with support for Premium Storage. The server does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This configuration provides a balanced allocation of compute, memory, and local storage resources alongside dedicated graphics acceleration. It is designed for workloads such as GPU-accelerated data processing, rendering, machine learning inference, and database operations that require fast local storage and dedicated CPU performance.
